クラス CombatActionResolver

java.lang.Object
simulation.runtime.CombatActionResolver
public class CombatActionResolver extends Object
Resolves an AttackAction into damage, aura changes, reactions, and related combat side effects without advancing simulation time.

This class extracts the heavy action-resolution logic out of CombatSimulator so that the simulator can focus on orchestration, timeline progression, and party-level state management.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • CombatActionResolver

      public CombatActionResolver(CombatSimulator sim)
      Creates a resolver bound to the given simulator instance.
      パラメータ:
      sim - active combat simulator whose runtime state will be read and updated

  • メソッドの詳細

    • resolveWithoutTimeAdvance

      public void resolveWithoutTimeAdvance(CharacterId characterId, AttackAction action)
      Resolves all damage and elemental effects of an AttackAction without advancing simulation time.

      This is used by the simulator for immediate action execution and by periodic timer events whose timing is managed elsewhere.

      パラメータ:
      characterId - the character performing the action
      action - the AttackAction to resolve
      例外:
      RuntimeException - if no character with characterId exists in the party
